div.div:
GET:
/overall_single_placement => [ single_placement ]
/single_placement/{age_division_id} => single_placement
/overall_double_placement => [ double_placement]
/double_placement/{age_division_id} => double_placement
/doubles => [ doubles ]
/doubles/{id} => doubles
/member => [member]
/member/{id} => member
/age_division => [age_division]
/age_division/{id} => age_division
/games_single => [games_single]
/games_single/{id} => games_single
/games_double => [games_double]
/games_double/{id} => games_double

div.div:
types:
single_placement
{
member_id: number,
placement: number,
timestamp: datetime
}
double_placement
{
doubles_id: number,
placement: number,
timestamp: datetime
}
doubles
{
doubles_id: number,
member_a: number,
member_b: number
}
member
{
member_id: number,
first_name: varchar,
last_name: varchar,
display_name:varchar,
gender: varchar,
age_division_id:number,
overall_active: bool
}
age_division
{
age_division_id: number,
description: varchar
}
